app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.52 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for faster stream startup, restored optional Anime, and smoother profile editing.
releaseNotes: Faster priority stream checks before slower fallback groups
Additional direct stream response shapes are now parsed correctly
Optional Anime tab is available again through Customize Tabs
Kids profiles still hide Anime and Sports automatically
Profile editor actions now stay reachable on phone screens
Stream requests now use the current app version header
Release metadata and update notification were refreshed

items.title: The Cube 2.0.52
items.message: Stream startup, tab customization, and profile editing were improved.

items.title: Active Development Notice
items.message: THE CUBE is under heavy, active development. Expect frequent updates, sometimes multiple times a week, as features are added, bugs are fixed, and things get reworked. Breaking changes, UI shifts, and rough edges are part of the process right now.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
